svg.text: pushbutton mode select · single /OSC domain · supervised reset — gate-level redraw from netlist
STEP REQUEST LATCH (holds a press until /OSC samples it)
resetN = /Q3 · /RST (R12 + D6/D7) — latch clears each step pulse and on power-up
FF0/1 reset-sync · FF2/3 step-sync · FF4/5 mode-resync · FF6/7 spare
Net labels (same name = same net): STEP_DB · OSC · /OSC · MODE_STEP · MODE_RUN · Qreq · /RST · /RSTs · Q0 · Q2 · Q3 · /Q3 · SP · SEL_STEP · SEL_RUN.

CLK = OSC·SEL_RUN + SP·SEL_STEP. Every '273 flip-flop clocks on /OSC, so the mode selects, the step pulse SP and /RST only take effect while OSC is low. 556 CV pins (10n to GND) and per-IC 100n decoupling not shown.
Gate ICs broken into individual gates: U2A–F = 74HC14 inverters; U3A–D and U6A–D = 74HC00 NANDs. D5 forces STEP mode whenever /RST is low.
